verdict_reasoning: LYN is a non-receptor Src-family tyrosine kinase anchored to the inner leaflet of the plasma membrane via N-terminal myristoylation and palmitoylation. It lacks a transmembrane domain and its catalytic domain is cytoplasmic. Although LYN localizes to the PM in certain cell states (polarized epithelial cells), it remains inaccessible from the extracellular face. No evidence of cell-surface-directed therapeutics (antibodies, ADCs, CAR-T) targeting LYN as a surface antigen. The protein is exclusively intracellular/inner-leaflet-anchored and cannot be reached by extracellular binders.
